Die drei ??? - Chamäleonbande

You are a young detective investigating the mysterious "Chameleon Gang" across multiple locations. Examine crime scenes, collect evidence, interview suspects, and solve puzzles to uncover the truth. Navigate through locations using arrow keys, interact with hotspots using SPACE to collect clues, and solve mini-puzzles to progress. Your goal is to gather all evidence, interrogate all suspects, and identify the gang members to solve the case!

Arrow Keys: Navigate and select | SPACE: Interact | Z: Case file | SHIFT: Skip dialogue | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
